channel.title: Architecture on Mark Cooper
channel.description: Recent content in Architecture on Mark Cooper

item.title: MPC Project Analyser
item.description:
MPC Project Analyser Link to heading

The MPC Project Analyser is a deterministic, batch-based analysis engine written in Python. It bridges the gap between expensive, high-reasoning AI models and cost-effective execution models. Rather than feeding raw source code to every AI agent, the analyser generates compact structural metadata — AST signatures, file trees, documentation maps — that enables agents to plan software changes safely and efficiently without consuming unnecessary context.
